history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a white t-shirt, grey pants, and black shoes is riding a bright turquoise scooter on an asphalt road. They have a black backpack on. The scooter has chrome accents and a black seat with a red "MARU'S FACTORY" logo. The rider is wearing a blue, white, and red Arai helmet with a clear visor. The background shows a street with houses and trees, suggesting a residential area. The lighting is bright daylight, casting shadows. The mood is casual and dynamic. The style is photorealistic.
